Header file for starting the discovery of GATT services, characteristics, and descriptors on a device.

# Purpose
This C header file defines constants and declares a function related to Bluetooth GATT (Generic Attribute Profile) client service discovery. The file includes the `bluetooth_types.h` header, which suggests it uses types related to Bluetooth operations. It defines two constants: `GATT_CLIENT_DISCOVERY_MAX_RETRY_BITS` and `GATT_CLIENT_DISCOVERY_MAX_RETRY`, which are used to set the maximum number of retries for GATT service discovery. The function [`gatt_client_discovery_discover_all`](<#gatt_client_discovery_discover_all>) is declared to initiate the discovery of all GATT services, characteristics, and descriptors for a specified Bluetooth device. The function returns different error codes based on the success or failure of the discovery process, such as `BTErrnoOK`, `BTErrnoInvalidParameter`, `BTErrnoInvalidState`, or other internal errors.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `bluetooth/bluetooth_types.h`
